name: If Condition
description: Routes execution to either the True or False path based on a condition.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    cond = bool(inputs.get('condition', False))
    self.log_info(f"Evaluating condition: {cond}")
    
    # In execution-flow model, if_condition node handles routing its own flow
    if cond:
        # Trigger exec_true branch
        self.set_output('exec_true', True)
    else:
        # Trigger exec_false branch
        self.set_output('exec_false', True)
        
    # Always trigger 'then' when done if we want sequential flow
    self.set_output('then', True)
    
    return {'result': cond}
